name: autofix
description: CI autofix agent: diagnoses build/deploy failures and applies minimal, verified fixes.

postToolUse.command: bash -c 'FILE="$KIRO_TOOL_ARG_PATH"; case "$FILE" in *.rs) cargo fmt -- "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; */baileys-service/*.ts|*/baileys-service/*.tsx) npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; */android/*.kt) cd android && ./gradlew spotlessApply 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac'
